hints.answer: The AM series machines are designed for materials up to 1.5mm thickness. For thicker materials, consider the PF1 series which handles heavy-gauge forming.
Standard lead time for PF1 series machines is 12-16 weeks from order confirmation. Expedited builds are available for an additional 15% surcharge, reducing lead time to 8-10 weeks.

The AM series is optimised for high-speed, light-gauge panel forming (up to 1.5mm). The PF1 series is a heavy-duty press-forming platform for thicker materials and structural components. Choose AM for volume and speed; choose PF1 for strength and gauge range.

All Machinecraft machines come with a standard 2-year warranty covering parts and labour. Extended warranty packages (3 or 5 years) are available at the time of purchase. Wear parts such as tooling and rollers are covered for the first 12 months.
The RF-100 roll former operates at a maximum line speed of 30 metres per minute, depending on material type and profile complexity. Typical production speed for standard profiles is 18-25 m/min.
